subject: Stuck on the week 2 embeddings exercise
snippet: Hi! I'm loving the cohort but I'm hitting a wall on the embeddings notebook — my vectors come back all zeros. Any pointers before tomorrow's session?
voice_examples: Hey Priya — totally normal to hit that wall. Nine times out of ten the all-zeros thing means the model never finished downloading. Re-run the setup cell and watch for the progress bar. Ping me if it's still flat after that. Sid
Glad you're enjoying it! Quick fix: restart the kernel and run the cells top to bottom. Lmk how it goes. Sid

subject: Pricing for the team plan?
snippet: We're a team of 12 and want to bring everyone through the masterclass next quarter. Do you offer group rates, and what's the per-seat price?
voice_examples: Hi Marcus — we do team rates! For groups of 10+ it's usually a custom bundle. I'll send over the details so you can budget for next quarter. Sid

subject: Sponsoring the next cohort
snippet: Orbit would love to sponsor your upcoming cohort. We're thinking a logo placement plus a short workshop slot. Can we hop on a call this week to scope it?
voice_examples: Hey Dana — appreciate the interest! Happy to chat sponsorship. A workshop slot could be a great fit if it's genuinely useful to the cohort. Send me a couple of times and I'll grab one. Sid

subject: Would you mentor me 1:1?
snippet: I've followed your work for a while and I'm trying to break into AI engineering. Any chance you take on mentees, even just a monthly check-in?
voice_examples: Hi Tomas — thanks for the kind words. I keep formal 1:1 mentoring pretty limited, but the cohort is where I pour most of that energy. If you join, you'll get plenty of direct feedback from me. Sid

subject: Co-marketing partnership idea
snippet: We run a newsletter for indie devs (40k subs) and think there's a natural overlap. Open to a cross-promo or a co-hosted live build session?
voice_examples: Hey Aisha — a co-hosted live build sounds fun and very on-brand for both audiences. Let's start small and see how it lands. What dates are you eyeing? Sid

subject: Coffee when you're back in town?
snippet: Heard you'll be in Lisbon next month. Would be great to catch up in person if you have a free hour — my treat!
voice_examples: Jordan! Yes — Lisbon early next month. Coffee would be great. I'll text you once my schedule firms up. Sid
